case_number: Criminal Acquittal Appeal shall be dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No.S-54 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.1730/2018 2. For orders on MA No.1731/2016 3. For hearing of main case 03-05-2019 None present.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the appellant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing i.e 08.04.2019 when the matter was adjourned with caution that if counsel for the appellant fails to appear for any reason this Criminal Acquittal Appeal shall be dismissed for non-prosecution. Hence the appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
